Master Craftsman · Est. 1985

Owner Profile

Master Craftsman
K. Murugan
Wood Work & Furniture Expert · Mathigiri, Hosur

With over 38 years of hands-on expertise since 1985, K. Murugan is Mathigiri's most trusted master craftsman. Every piece leaving his workshop is a testament to traditional South Indian craftsmanship — from hand-carved teak doors to luxury bedroom sets — all built to last generations.

Mr. Murugan personally oversees every step, from selecting premium Grade-A wood to the final lacquer polish, ensuring unmatched quality in every single piece delivered to your home.

Established

Since 1985

Location

Mathigiri, Hosur

Speciality

Custom Furniture

Wood Grade

Grade A Only

Pricing & Availability

Types of Wood & Rates

All rates are per square foot (sq.ft). Custom sizes available. GST applicable. Contact for bulk quotation.

🌳
Teak Wood
தேக்கு மரம்
₹3,000/ sq.ft
Most popular & durable
Termite-proof, golden-brown
Best for bedroom & doors
🌹
Rose Wood
செம்மர மரம்
₹10,000/ sq.ft
Premium grain pattern
Deep reddish-brown luxury
Ideal for high-end furniture
🏔️
Burma Wood
பர்மா மரம்
₹10,500/ sq.ft
Finest imported grade
100+ year lifespan
Ultra-fine grain quality
🌿
Neem Wood
வேம்பு மரம்
₹1,000/ sq.ft
Natural insect-repellent
Perfect for pooja mandirs
Light & easy to carve
🌾
Akasi Wood
அகேஷியா மரம்
₹1,500/ sq.ft
Hard & dense grain
Ideal for outdoor furniture
Water & weather resistant
🎋
Naga Tree Wood
நாக மர மரம்
₹900/ sq.ft
Light & economical
Good for panelling work
Easy finishing & polish
✏️
Custom Wood
உங்கள் தேர்வு
On Request
Any wood of your choice
Custom size & design
Free consultation available

✦ Final pricing depends on design complexity, dimensions & finish. Contact for a free custom quotation.

Our Works

🛋️
Sofa Set
Wooden Sofa Set (5 Seater)
Sheesham/teak 5-seater sofa with plush cushions. Traditional carved or modern minimalist design — your choice.
₹28,000 onwards
🪑
Arm Chairs
Teak Arm Chair Set (2 Pcs)
Hand-carved teak arm chairs with cushion seating. Perfect for living rooms, verandahs & reading corners.
₹16,000 / set
☕
Coffee Table
Wooden Coffee Table
Solid teak coffee table with lower shelf. Round, square or rectangular — custom dimensions available.
₹8,500 onwards
📺
TV Unit
Wooden TV Unit / Entertainment Cabinet
Modern teak/sheesham TV unit with cable management, drawers and open shelving. Custom width available.
₹22,000 onwards
📚
Bookshelf
Wooden Bookshelf / Display Unit
Teak or sheesham multi-shelf bookcase with optional glass doors. Ideal for home or office display.
₹14,000 onwards
🎨
Wall Unit
Wooden Wall Display Unit
Feature wall display unit combining open shelves, drawers and a TV panel. Custom width and finish.
₹32,000 onwards
🛏️
Bedroom Set
King Size Bedroom Set
Teak wood bedroom set with carved headboard, matching side tables & wardrobe. Custom sizes on request.
₹65,000 onwards
🪞
Dressing Table
Dressing Table with Mirror
Elegant rosewood dressing table with ornate mirror frame, multiple drawers and matching stool.
₹18,000 onwards
🗄️
Wardrobe
3-Door Wardrobe
Teak 3-door wardrobe with hanging space, shelves & optional mirror. Termite-treated and lacquer-coated.
₹35,000 onwards
🛏️
Cot
Single / Double Wood Cot
Simple to ornate teak wood cot in single, queen or king size. With or without storage box underneath.
₹18,000 onwards
🪑
Bed Side Table
Bedside Table (Pair)
Matching pair of bedside tables with drawer and lower shelf. Teak or sheesham with custom finish.
₹7,500 / pair
✏️
Custom Bedroom
Complete Custom Bedroom Set
Full bedroom solution — bed, wardrobe, dressing table & side tables — all matched in your choice of wood & finish.
₹90,000 full set

Dining Set
Dining Table Set (6 Seater)
Solid teak dining table with 6 chairs. Traditional or contemporary design. Polished or raw wood finish.
₹42,000 onwards
🪑
Dining Chairs
Teak Dining Chairs (Set of 4)
Classic hand-carved teak dining chairs with cushioned or cane seat. Matching any table size.
₹12,000 / 4 pcs
🗄️
Crockery Unit
Wooden Crockery Unit / Buffet
Solid wood crockery unit with display cabinet, drawer storage and lower cupboards. Elegant dining room addition.
₹24,000 onwards
🍳
Kitchen Cabinet
Wooden Kitchen Cabinet Unit
Modular kitchen cabinets in teak or plywood with anti-scratch laminate. Custom size and layout available.
₹850 / sq.ft
🙏
Pooja Cabinet
Pooja Mandir Cabinet
Intricately hand-carved neem/teak mandir with traditional South Indian motifs. Wall or floor-standing.
₹12,000 onwards
⛩️
Temple Design
Full Pooja Room Temple Design
Complete pooja room design with carved pillars, ceiling panel, mandir, and storage cabinet — all matching wood.
₹45,000 onwards
🏠
Wall Mandir
Wall-Mounted Wooden Mandir
Space-saving wall-mounted mandir with carved arch, shelf, and small storage. Neem wood recommended.
₹6,500 onwards
🪵
Carved Pillar
Carved Wooden Pillars (Pair)
Traditional South Indian hand-carved wooden pillars for pooja rooms, entrance halls and verandahs.
₹18,000 / pair
💼
Office Table
Executive Office Table
Solid teak/sheesham executive desk with drawers, cable management and file cabinet. Custom sizes.
₹24,000 onwards

Wooden File Cabinet / Storage Unit
Multi-drawer wooden file cabinet or open shelf storage unit for office or home study room.
₹9,500 onwards

Study Table with Shelf Unit
Compact wooden study table with overhead book shelf, drawer and pen stand. Perfect for students.

Complete Office Furniture Set
Full office setup — reception desk, workstation tables, chairs, file cabinets. Bulk orders accepted.
Custom bulk pricing

Wooden Staircase & Railing
Premium teak or rosewood staircase with carved railings. Adds luxury and character to any home.
₹1,800 / sq.ft

Wooden False Ceiling Panel
Decorative teak/plywood false ceiling for hall, bedroom or pooja room. Custom patterns and finishes.
₹320 / sq.ft
🖼️
Wall Panel
Decorative Wooden Wall Panel
Feature wall panels for TV unit, headboard or living room. Lattice, solid or hand-carved designs.
₹280 / sq.ft
🏠
Roof Truss
Wooden Roof Truss / Beam Work
Structural and decorative roof trusses for homes, halls & commercial spaces. Heavy-duty teak beams.
₹4,500 / cubic ft
🪵
Custom Carving
Custom Wood Carving Work
Intricate hand carving for pillars, panels, frames and decorative elements. Temples, homes & commercial.
₹500 / sq.ft
🛖
Pergola
Wooden Pergola / Gazebo
Custom outdoor teak pergola and wooden gazebo for gardens, terraces and commercial spaces.
₹850 / sq.ft
Crafted Entry Points

Our Door Collections

All doors are custom-made with solid Grade A wood, polished and pre-hung with frames. Delivery & installation available.

🚪
Main Entrance Door (Teak, Carved)
Solid teak main entrance door with intricate traditional South Indian carvings and heavy-duty frame. Custom dimensions.
₹22,000 onwards
🏠
Double Leaf Main Door
Grand double-leaf teak/Burma wood main door for bungalows and large homes. Carved design with brass fittings.
₹45,000 onwards
🪟
Panel Interior Door (Teak)
Elegant 4-panel or 6-panel interior bedroom/bathroom teak door with matching frame. Smooth and durable.
₹9,500 / door
🛖
Pooja Room Carved Door
Specially carved neem/teak door for pooja rooms with traditional motifs of lotus, peacock and temple arch.
₹15,000 onwards
🚿
Bathroom Door (Waterproof Teak)
Moisture-resistant treated teak bathroom doors with waterproof lacquer. Built for humid conditions. Long-lasting.
₹9,500 / door
🏢
Office / Commercial Door
Solid sheesham or teak office doors with modern panel design. Also available with glass panels. Bulk orders accepted.
₹12,000 / door
